title: angophora floribunda var. woodsiana
intro: Angophora floribunda var. woodsiana, also known as the Sydney smooth-barked apple, is a variety of Angophora floribunda, a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a deciduous tree or shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Angophora floribunda var. woodsiana include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
